data.title: Calumet (NASDAQ: CLMT) to join two investor conferences in September 2025.
data.description: Calumet, Inc. (NASDAQ: CLMT) revealed its participation in two investor conferences scheduled for September 2025. The first conference, Barclays 39th Annual CEO Energy-Power Conference, will take place on September 3rd. Calumet will be in attendance to engage with investors and industry professionals during this event. Additionally, the company will be present at another conference later in the month to further discuss its strategies and performance. This initiative demonstrates Calumet's commitment to enhancing shareholder value and promoting transparency in its operations.

data.title: India EV market growing with electric four-wheelers; driven by gov't initiatives. Report covers 2024-2031 - domestic/offshore OEM brands involved - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
data.description: In Dublin, a report titled "Electric Vehicle Market, India, 2024-2031" has been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. The adoption of electric four-wheelers in India is increasing steadily, positioning it as a significant market for international firms. The expansion of the electric vehicle (EV) market in the nation is largely fueled by government programs and benefits, with a strong emphasis on enhancing manufacturing localization, securing the supply chain, and boosting export competitiveness. Additionally, environmental concerns play a crucial role in driving the growth of EV adoption in India.

data.title: Despite launching Season 8 security upgrades, OP's price drops by 7.45% to $0.66. Technical signals display mixed trends.
data.description: The value of OP stands at $0.66 currently, marking a decrease of 7.45% within a 24-hour period. Despite this dip, Optimism has introduced Season 8 security enhancements. Analysts point towards technical indicators indicating a possible rebound from the support level.

data.title: Onward Technologies opens offices in Birmingham & Munich to expand global delivery model.
data.description: A digital engineering firm, Onward Technologies, has recently announced the opening of new offices in Birmingham, UK, and Munich, Germany. These strategic locations aim to bolster the company's global delivery capabilities by incorporating local agility into its operations.

data.title: The 149-room luxury hotel re-emerges as The Sun Rose West Hollywood with plans to expand dining, wellness, and nightlife experiences.
data.description: The Sun Rose West Hollywood, a prestigious 149-room luxury hotel located at 8430 W Sunset Blvd in Los Angeles, has recently undergone a transformation and rebranding. With a new focus on enhancing dining, wellness, and nightlife offerings, the award-winning hotel aims to cater to both travelers and local guests seeking unique experiences. This refurbishment signifies a bold move by the hotel to appeal to a more discerning and trendy clientele in the vibrant city.

data.title: Chevron achieves record production, reports $44.82 billion in quarterly sales despite lower earnings.
data.description: Chevron Corp. (NYSE: CVX) released their second-quarter 2025 financial results, with adjusted earnings of $1.77 per share surpassing the Wall Street expectation of $1.76, despite a decrease from $2.55 compared to the previous year. The company reported sales of $44.82 billion, outperforming the estimated $43.43 billion, even though experiencing a 12.5% year-over-year decline. The reported earnings for the quarter were $2.5 billion ($1.45 per diluted share), down from $4.4 billion year-on-year. This decrease was primarily due to lower crude oil prices and a one-time net loss of $215 million related to the fair value measurement of Hess shares. The energy giant's varied segment performance, including U.S. upstream earnings, contributed to these numbers.

data.title: EHang's VT20 series eVTOL completes 83km cargo flight between Zhuhai and Guangzhou, saving 40mins vs road transport.
data.description: EHang Holdings Limited, a leading urban air mobility technology platform company traded on Nasdaq under the symbol EH, recently reported a significant milestone in its aviation technology. The company's VT20 series logistics eVTOL aircraft successfully completed a round trip cargo delivery between Zhuhai and Guangzhou in China. This long-range UAV route covered a distance of 83 kilometers and lasted around 55 minutes. This achievement marks a remarkable advancement in the field, enabling improved logistics efficiency between the two cities. Compared to traditional road transport, the eVTOL flights save up to 40 minutes, increasing to over an hour during peak traffic conditions.

data.title: Frontera Energy (TSX: FEC) & CGX Energy (TSXV: OYL) update Corentyne Block license as of Aug 1, 2025. May 9, 2025 disclosure mentioned.
data.description: Today, in Calgary, Alberta, Frontera Energy Corporation (TSX: FEC) and CGX Energy Inc. (TSXV: OYL) shared an update on the Corentyne block license. Initially announced on May 9, 2025, Frontera and its subsidiaries have been working on this project. The developments are key for both companies as they progress on this endeavor. The Corentyne block license is a significant opportunity for Frontera and CGX to expand their operations and establish a stronger presence in the energy sector. Investors and stakeholders are keen on the outcome of this collaboration as it could potentially boost the companies' growth and revenue.

data.title: ONEOK stock Q2 earnings: EPS $1.33, revenue $8.33B. Offers 5.02% dividend yield, $1.03 per share quarterly. $500 monthly achievable.
data.description: ONEOK, Inc. will report its second-quarter earnings on Aug. 4 after the market closes. Analysts predict earnings of $1.33 per share, matching last year's performance. The company is expected to post quarterly revenue of $8.33 billion, up from $4.89 billion last year. ONEOK has garnered attention, with investors considering the potential returns from its dividends. The company's current annual dividend yield is 5.02%, offering a quarterly dividend of $1.03 per share ($4.12 annually). To earn $500 monthly from ONEOK, one would need to target $6,000 yearly. This translates to dividing $6,000 by the $4.12 dividend, presenting a lucrative opportunity for investors.

data.title: SUTNTIB AB Tewox's NAV for July 2025 drops to EUR 46,025,174 from EUR 46,370,405 in June 2025.
data.description: In Vilnius, Lithuania, as of the end of July 2025, the net asset value (NAV) of SUTNTIB AB Tewox dropped to EUR 46,025,174 from EUR 46,370,405 in June 2025.
